basePrompts.title: Eternal Coil Core
basePrompts.prompt: A fractal Ouroboros serpent coiled in cosmic space, Cardano-native blue accents, psychedelic but readable, strong centered silhouette, premium generative NFT style, clean thumbnail composition

basePrompts.title: Deluxe Chaos Core

basePrompts.title: Nested Gallery Core
